issue.body:
- name: 'Test JSON Editor'
  description: 'A simple and intuitive JSON editor for creating and validating JSON data.'
  toolingTypes: ['editor', 'validator']
  languages: ['JavaScript', 'TypeScript']
  environments: ['Web', 'Cross-Platform']
  maintainers:
    - name: 'Tech Team'
      platform: 'github'
  creators:
    - name: 'Tech Innovations'
      platform: 'other'
  homepage: 'https://www.testjsoneditor.com'
  license: 'MIT'
  supportedDialects:
    draft: ['2020-12', '2019-09']
